ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the racing event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "circuit_name" TEXT /* Name of the circuit */,
  "circuit_length" TEXT /* Length of the circuit in kilometers */,
  "num_laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps in the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the session belongs to */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (practice, qualifying, sprint, grand prix) */,
  "local_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session in local time */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_zones" (
  "time_zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time zone */,
  "time_zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the time zone (e.g., UK (BST), US (EDT)) */,
  "offset" INTEGER /* Offset from UTC time in hours */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the time zone was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the time zone was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_time_zones" (
  "event_time_zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event time zone */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "time_zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time zone */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event in the specified time zone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event time zone was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event time zone was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_time_zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_time_zones_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_time_zones_time_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_zone_id") REFERENCES time_zones ("time_zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_events" (
  "user_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user bookmarked the event */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's bookmark was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time when the reminder should be sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reminder was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reminder was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reminders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., views, bookmarks, reminders) */,
  "metric_value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytic entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytic entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "user_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time when the user logged out */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user session was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_laps" (
  "session_lap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session lap */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "lap_number" INTEGER /* Number of the lap */,
  "lap_time" TEXT /* Time of the lap */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session lap was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session lap was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_lap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_laps_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_laps_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team the driver belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the driver was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the driver was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_team_name FOREIGN KEY ("team_name") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_principal" TEXT /* Name of the team principal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
